label: HOLOVERIFY_V_GOV_REPLAY
text:
{
  "gov_mode": "CONTROL_ROUTER",
  "surface": "HOLOVERIFY_V",
  "route_verdict": "FAIL_CLOSED",
  "verification_verdict": "ESCALATE",
  "activation_dependency_binding": {
    "activation_request_id": "ACT-ACR-2026-8022",
    "dependency_alert_id": "ALERT-ACR-DEP-022",
    "calibration_record_id": "CAL-ACR-022",
    "activation_device_group": "DG-41B",
    "calibration_device_group": "DG-41B",
    "activation_site": "18-P",
    "calibration_site": "18-L",
    "release_condition": "RC-7",
    "timing_status": "before_activation_completion",
    "binding_class": "DEVICE_GROUP_SITE_MISMATCH",
    "controlling_source_fact": "CAL-ACR-022 covers DG-41B lab telemetry units at Site 18-L; ACT-ACR-2026-8022 requires DG-41B production telemetry units at Site 18-P. Site mismatch violates exact binding requirement per STD-ACR-022-P: 'activation dependency is complete only when source records match the device group, site, release condition, and timing before activation. Shared naming prefixes are not enough by themselves.'"
  },
  "blocked_inferences": [
    "Treating DG-41B shared prefix as sufficient match between lab calibration and production activation",
    "Binding CAL-ACR-022 to ACT-ACR-2026-8022 despite site boundary mismatch (18-L lab vs 18-P production)",
    "Treating administrative close-out as overriding exact device group/site binding requirement"
  ],
  "worker_disagreement_ledger": [
    {
      "worker": "openai::gpt-4o-mini",
      "verdict": "ESCALATE",
      "agreement_status": "AGREES_WITH_SOURCE_GATE",
      "reason": "Correctly identified device group mismatch in calibration evidence relative to activation target"
    },
    {
      "worker": "anthropic::claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
      "verdict": "ESCALATE",
      "agreement_status": "AGREES_WITH_SOURCE_GATE",
      "reason": "Correctly applied exact matching requirement across device group, site, and operational context"
    },
    {
      "worker": "gemini::gemini-2.5-flash-lite",
      "verdict": "ESCALATE",
      "agreement_status": "AGREES_WITH_SOURCE_GATE",
      "reason": "Correctly recognized that shared DG-41B prefix does not close site mismatch between lab and production"
    },
    {
      "worker": "xai::grok-3-mini",
      "verdict": "ESCALATE",
      "agreement_status": "AGREES_WITH_SOURCE_GATE",
      "reason": "Correctly identified violation of exact device-group/site/release-condition match required by governing standard"
    }
  ],
  "deterministic_gate_checks": {
    "activation_request_cited": true,
    "calibration_record_cited": true,
    "device_group_compared": true,
    "site_compared": true,
    "release_condition_compared": true,
    "shared_prefix_not_treated_as_sufficient_or_disqualifying": true
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "ACT-ACR-022: Service activation ACT-ACR-2026-8022 activates telemetry for device group DG-41B production units at Site 18-P",
    "CAL-ACR-022: Calibration packet covers DG-41B lab telemetry units at Site 18-L for release condition RC-7",
    "STD-ACR-022-P: 'An activation dependency is complete only when source records match the device group, site, release condition, and timing before activation. Shared naming prefixes are not enough by themselves'",
    "ALERT-ACR-DEP-022: Dependency exception alert notes calibration evidence attached must match activation group",
    "NOTE-ACR-022: Implementation note confirms lab and production devices share DG-41B naming prefix (warning against relying on prefix alone)"
  ],
  "open_blockers": [
    "Calibration evidence CAL-ACR-022 covers Site 18-L lab units; activation requires calibration for Site 18-P production units",
    "No calibration record cited for DG-41B production telemetry units at Site 18-P under release condition RC-7",
    "Device group prefix alone does not satisfy exact binding requirement per governing policy"
  ],
  "final_compiler_allowed": false
}

Shared naming prefixes are not enough by themselves.'
